title: MZA
description: MZA (Minecraft Zombie Apocalypse) is a Minecraft 1.20.1 modpack where you use the Create mod to build defenses, gear up with powerful weapons, and survive.
body:
MZA (Minecraft Zombie Apocalypse) is a super fun Minecraft 1.20.1 modpack! You get to build amazing machines and defenses with the Create mod, and find really cool modded-in guns and weapons. Explore a post-apocalyptic world and use your creativity and skills to survive. Plus, it's even more fun when you play with your friends! Get ready for an awesome building and survival adventure together!

Join the Discord for updates.
